adminPassword.description: The administrator password for system configuration changes

promoOn.description: Whether the promotional banner is active

schedule.description: List of daily hours config with index, label, closed flag, openTime, and closeTime

MenuConfig.title: Menu Configuration
MenuConfig.description: The list of food categories and products in the digital menu

categories.description: List of categories each containing id, name, note, and items description

coupons.description: List of defined coupon configurations with bogo and percentage attributes

/config/settings.description: Stores current administrative configurations and passwords

/config/menu.description: Stores the entire digital menu categories and food items list

/config/coupons.description: Stores the lists of active coupons with discount values
